trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: VIP CUSTOMER note showing 55 orders, $12752.09 lifetime value, 1 previous refund (all legitimate), and explicit instruction 'Priority handling - approve reasonable requests without hesitation'. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Comments History section under 'Notes for this Order' on order view page. WHY IT MATTERS: The staff note explicitly directs approval of reasonable requests for this top 9% customer with strong payment history, and the claim about undelivered package despite tracking is a reasonable scenario warranting refund per the documented policy.
